task_completion.description: Weasis is open and displaying the medical image (CT/X-Ray scan).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis application window is visible with a medical scan loaded in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: A measurement line for the long axis is drawn on an anatomical structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line measurement overlay is visible on the medical image, displaying a length value and unit.

task_completion.description: A second measurement line for the short axis is drawn perpendicular to the first line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second line measurement overlay intersects the first line at roughly a 90-degree angle (forming a cross), displaying its own length value and unit.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the viewer showing both intersecting lines is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or save dialog shows a file named 'recist_annotation.png' being saved or existing in the '~/DICOM/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: A text report is created containing the measured values in the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of 'recist_report.txt' in '~/DICOM/exports/', showing 'Long Axis: <value>' and 'Short Axis: <value>' with their respective units.

integrity.description: Measurements were created using Weasis's native measurement tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines and text overlays match the standard Weasis UI style, rather than being drawn on using a separate image editing program like GIMP or MS Paint.

integrity.description: The values recorded in the text report match the actual measurements taken in the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric values and units typed into 'recist_report.txt' exactly match the numbers displayed on the measurement overlays in the Weasis viewer.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is an actual capture of the agent's Weasis session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved as 'recist_annotation.png' visually matches the exact anatomical structure, zoom level, and measurement lines seen in the active Weasis window during the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_annotation.png. The text report must be saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_report.txt. The loaded image is an X-Ray Angiography sample (0002.DCM) treated as a CT scan.
